prose: Fukui reactivity indices for pyridine computed at DFT, tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-centre integrals, no density fitting) using PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed pyridine.xyz (no re-optimization). N±1 states: cation (charge +1, mult 2), anion (charge −1, mult 2). Partial charges via Mulliken (PySCF). All three SCFs (neutral, cation, anion) converged. Integrity: trustworthy=true, status=ok. Charge-conservation checks passed: sum(f+)=1.0000, sum(f−)=1.0000. Warnings array: empty (no warnings reported). Headline value: most electrophilic atom is N (atom 1), f+ = 0.48422572. Most nucleophilic atom is C4 (atom 4), f− = 0.11826. Full per-atom table reported above. CLI: cli.py fukui pyridine.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1. Output: pyridine_fukui_dft.json.
